name: Gray Ash Ykrul
agenda: Secure winter grazing lands and protect the clan from Ecktorian encroachment
keyNPCs: Khatun Sarnai — Proud chieftain of the Gray Ash
Yelü — Sarnai's daughter, child of a legionary
resources: Steppe riders, remounts, steppe knowledge, hostage strings
hooks: A hostage string has been cut—blood-price is due
description: The Gray Ash are a Ykrul clan of the Violet Steppe, known for their wolf-standards and fierce independence. They measure distance in oaths and remounts, not miles. Every child learns: count your exits before you enter, never commit to a single path, and an ally untested is a blade without a sheath.
